summary: R.2 ЧАСТ 2 Testing Complete - InlinePriceCell and BulkApplyDialog integration tested. Fixed critical bug (items→props). All features working: inline €/м² edit, new columns (€/м², Без ДДС, С ДДС), Bulk Apply dialog with filters and preview.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: AdminProperties.jsx used undefined 'items' variable instead of 'props' on lines 273, 289, 666 - caused runtime errors
InlinePriceCell correctly calculates list_price = ppm * area_total
BulkApplyDialog correctly filters properties by type/floor/status and excludes sold by default
Properties without area_total are correctly excluded from bulk preview (filter: !p.area_total returns false)
Optimistic state update working - page does NOT reload after inline edit

All data-testid attributes present and working: admin-bulk-apply-btn, admin-ppm-{code}, admin-ppm-{code}-input, bulk-apply-dialog, bulk-filter-type, bulk-filter-floor, bulk-filter-status, bulk-ppm-input, bulk-exclude-sold, bulk-preview, bulk-preview-row-{code}, bulk-apply-confirm-btn, bulk-cancel-btn
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing Хаджи Димитър project with 52 properties.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.2 ЧАСТ 2 fully tested. Fixed critical bug where 'items' was used instead of 'props' in AdminProperties.jsx. All new features verified: (1) Inline €/м² edit with Enter/Tab/blur save, (2) New columns €/м², Без ДДС, С ДДС in table header, (3) С ДДС = list_price * 1.20, (4) Bulk Apply dialog with type/floor/status filters, (5) Preview table shows old vs new prices, (6) Exclude sold checkbox (default checked), (7) Apply button sends PATCH requests and shows toast 'Обновени N имота', (8) Optimistic state update - no page reload after inline edit.
verified_features: Login as super_admin and navigate to /admin/properties - PASS
Table shows new columns: €/м², Без ДДС, С ДДС - PASS
Bulk цена/м² button visible in toolbar with data-testid='admin-bulk-apply-btn' - PASS
Inline edit on €/м² cell: click → input appears → enter value → Tab/Enter → toast success - PASS
С ДДС column shows list_price * 1.20 (e.g., 14,305 € → 17,165 €) - PASS
Bulk Apply dialog opens with data-testid='bulk-apply-dialog' - PASS
Bulk Apply filters: Тип имот, Етаж, Статус - PASS
Bulk Apply preview table shows filtered properties with old/new prices - PASS
Properties without area_total excluded from preview - PASS (all 52 properties have area_total)
Exclude sold checkbox (Изключи продадените) checked by default - PASS
Apply button shows 'Приложи на N обекта' - PASS
Bulk Apply sends PATCH requests and shows toast 'Обновени N имота' - PASS
Dialog closes after successful apply - PASS
Table refreshes with updated prices after bulk apply - PASS
Inline edit does NOT reload page (optimistic state update) - PASS
